'''Zirlig''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who was a member of the [[Antar Band]].

Zirlig had the reputation for being a perfectionist. His efforts resulted in a perfect record of murder-for-hires. He also worked for the Antar Band's leader, [[Ujin Voli]], for over two decades resulting in a deep loyalty, despite the Band's feud with the larger group [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].

Zirlig preferred a long-range blaster over messier methods of [[Death/Legends|killing]].
